name: Thumbprint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until fluffy.
2. Add the egg yolks, vanilla, and salt, and beat well.
3. Gradually add the flour, mixing thoroughly.
4. Form the dough into 3/4-inch balls.
5. Dip each ball in beaten egg whites and roll in nuts.
6. Place the cookies about 1 inch apart on a greased baking sheet.
7. Press down on the center of each cookie with your thumb.
8. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 17 minutes.
9. Allow the cookies to cool slightly, then remove them from the pan and let them cool completely on a wire rack.
10. Before serving, fill the centers of the cookies with your favorite jam.
